logos.qualityNote: Year-stamped (2026) edition logo. Replace with a year-neutral Cork Week brand mark if available.

266x214 JPEG on white, no transparency — the Fireball Ireland badge (red ball + "fire ball" + boat silhouette + IRELAND), the best the class could supply via HYC's sponsor portal. The country-neutral international mark is the separate `fireball` entry. Replace if Fireball Ireland issues a clean, higher-res or transparent logo. See issue

251x131 RGB PNG on white (no transparency) — the GP14 Ireland mark (bell-in-sail + GP14 + gp14ireland.com). gp14ireland.com only serves a 70x62 logo crop, so this Skerries SC-hosted copy is the best usable rendering. Replace if GP14 Ireland issues a clean transparent or vector logo (contact info@gp14ireland.com). The international class mark is the separate `gp14` entry. See issue
262x50 thin header-banner GIF; replace with a taller J/109 logo.
68x133 small logo from the class site (cropped). Replace with a higher-res J/24 logo.
Composite banner (club wordmark + a training-centre badge) from the site CDN, low height. Replace with the standalone Lough Derg YC logo.
114px favicon-size mark. Replace with a higher-res Round Ireland logo.
Official club burgee (goat's-head pennant), clean 1024px transparent PNG from the club site. Burgee-only — no wordmark; would prefer an official transparent wordmark-bearing logo. See issue
Year-stamped (2025) crest. Replace with a year-neutral Sovereign's Cup mark if available.
192px club burgee taken from the site favicon. Replace with a higher-res Strangford Lough YC logo.

Official International Topper Class Association (ITCA) mark — the "ITCA" wordmark + Topper sail (black top-hat class insignia) over waves + "International Topper Class Association" subtitle — as a clean transparent vector. White-on-blue variant only (single-colour white), so it is invisible on a light background; itcaworld.org publishes the generic, country-neutral mark in white only. Supersedes the Wikimedia "Topper_Logo.svg", which was the Topper *boat-builder* wordmark, not the class association. Replace with the generic colour ITCA vector once ITCA issues one (the colour mark is currently only published with a national code — see the topper-gbr and topper-ireland entries). See issue

800x875 JPEG on white, no transparency — the ITCA-GBR colour mark (navy "ITCA", red/white sail with the black top-hat insignia + "GBR", blue waves, "International Topper Class Association" subtitle). itca-gbr.co.uk only serves a 178px copy on a baked white rounded card, so this hi-res rendering (via sail-world) is the best usable one. GBR national variant; the international class mark is the separate `topper` entry. Replace with a clean transparent or vector ITCA-GBR logo (contact itca-gbr.co.uk). See issue
